name: Sticky Cats
description:
Sticky Cats is a 2 - 4 player party game, where players must steal the fish and escape out the window while sticking to everything and causing mayhem along the way.
Gamepad Controls:

Start/triangle button: Join game
Joystick: Move/aim for jumping
A or X button : Jump
Back button: Restart level
Keyboard Controls:
Enter: Join game
WASD/Arrow keys: Move/aim for jumping
Space: Jump
R: Restart level
Credits:
Jem Smith - Design and code
@jemmiwinks
Jason Sutherland - Design, art, and audio
@DriftPrism
Follow @stickycatsgame on Twitter
Please get in touch if you have any feedback, issues, or questions, and we’ll try and help.
Thanks for playing!
